name: SP8192 Trajectory Readout + Late Loop Onset
author: Artem Buldin
technique_summary: SP8192 + late loop onset at step 2600 + grouped trajectory-delta readout on the final recurrent block + full legal TTT
notes: Negative single-seed experiment. The run reached quantized evaluation but not a better final metric than the pass-gated baseline, and the total submission size was 16,064,921 bytes.
